name: efounders-design
description: Design toolbox — each skill installs on its own: explore directions, prototype, review, plus the design-system skills (audit, bootstrap, Figma sync).

plugins.name: design-skills
plugins.description: All the design-work skills in one install: prototype, product-review, and da-exploration.

plugins.name: ds-audit
plugins.description: Assess a project's design system: a score on two axes (clean codebase + AI-native) with turnkey fixes.

plugins.name: ds-bootstrap
plugins.description: Set up a project's design system from the shared base: tokens, components, conventions, first screens.

plugins.name: ds-figma
plugins.description: Generate or refresh a Figma design system from the code (the code stays the source of truth).

plugins.name: prototype
plugins.description: Prototype screens and flows against the project's real design system (HTML, Figma, or iso-prod code).

plugins.name: product-review
plugins.description: Senior UX/UI critique of a screen or a flow, grounded in named UX laws. Advisory, never a gate.

plugins.name: da-exploration
plugins.description: Explore distinct art directions for a brand or a screen, from reference images to a graphic universe.
